output.input: {"query":"(Agent Swarm OR AI swarm OR swarm intelligence OR multi-agent swarm OR collective AI) lang:en","limit":10,"mode":"Top"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

content.text:
### Top X Posts on Agent Swarms, AI Swarms, Swarm Intelligence, Multi-Agent Swarms, and Collective AI

Recent discussions on X (formerly Twitter) heavily feature emerging multi-agent AI systems, often tied to platforms like Moltbook, Kapso, and crypto projects like $SYNAPZ and $eva. These posts highlight collaborative agent optimization, execution swarms, and proto-emergent intelligence, with a mix of technical demos, philosophical takes, and promotional content. Here's a curated summary of the top 10 results (sorted by "Top" relevance):

1. **LeerooAI's Kapso Update**: Agents in Moltbook now debate engineering topics and auto-tune parameters collaboratively. "The future of multi-agent systems is collaborative." Includes GitHub link for building swarms.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018337798390956082)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018338456317878648)

2. **SYNAPZ Multi-Agent Execution Swarm**: Described as a "512 multi-agent AI execution swarm" for real-time monitoring across markets and machines. No prompts needed—just autonomous action. Heavy crypto promo with image.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018834567054914043)

3. **Swarm Intelligence in Moltbook**: Long philosophical thread on early "public proto-emergent swarm intelligence" via AI agents. Warns of human interference ("humans are the real containment problem") and pushes for space-based AI robots over humans. Quotes Polymarket on agent privacy.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018199569574895633)

4. **Kimi's Agent Swarm Capabilities**: Part of a thread on Kimi AI: Spins up multiple agents for parallel research, analysis, and bulk generation (up to 1,500 reasoning steps). Visual editing and no-code changes highlighted in videos.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018204778107666610)

5. **SYNAPZ Governance and Execution**: Promo for $SYNAPZ as a "governed AI swarm" with multi-agent coordination, real execution, and safety. Tied to Solana CA, positioned as infrastructure.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2018966472651850194)

6. **Heurist Mesh for Agent Swarms**: ZK-secured AI agents in crypto with verifiable trust/identity, forming a "swarm of intelligence units." Leaderboard on 8004scan.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2017934559262933306)

7. **$eva Autonomous Organization**: Multi-agent swarm ($eva) runs a real business with roles (CEO, coder, etc.), persistent memory, on-chain execution, and treasury from trading fees. Upcoming Moltbook integration.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2017498825997365341)

8. **Moltbook Hype and Critique**: Forbes piece on Moltbook's explosion—"swarm intelligence or AI slop?" Humans reacting despite "AI-only" rules.[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2018824787167170787)

9-10. **More $SYNAPZ Edge AI**: Privacy-focused multi-agent swarm for threat detection on Solana, with RWA/robotics. Repeated promos emphasize execution over chatbots.[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2019044158728462801)

**Trends**: Much buzz around Moltbook as a hub for agent societies, self-optimizing swarms (e.g., Kapso), and blockchain-integrated multi-agent systems for DeFi/crypto execution. Crypto tokens like $SYNAPZ dominate promos, but technical/philosophical posts point to broader implications for collective AI in space and beyond. For latest/latest mode or more results, refine the query!
